reviews.review_description: It was really easy to get used to and was fun to play
It's nice but it need more like pick up package delivery something like that
Good idea, but that's all.  The menu doesn't work, the tasks to look in the trash can't be completed, and when it hits the ground it behaves like a lawnmower.

I own a drone and this seems to react as expected! 
Looking forward to seeing this in development

Ok now feed back!

Drones have a dead zone! This is why on top of buildings helicopters landing pads are made of mesh! ( so the high speed air can pass through with out disrupting the air craft)
 
Also look up mast bump ! ( a thing that pilots are told about ( helicopter physics !)

What next well speed training ,skill,distance
,surveillance, rescue,chase.

Building a drone would be cool 😎 and display flying.

Hope my input helps.

this app is pretty good can't find a way to fly fpv without looking at the controller. also the drone is VERY sensitive.
8/10 would recommend
